TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Bacingul ga niya mki sku Taitung Keng atu Umitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 67 buwan, 274 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 263 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 84%, Amis 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 9%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Bacingul hya' ga Ku'ang sang go'. tay 'zil na Bacingul hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Bacingul hya' ga Yanping. tay mkraya' na Bacingul hya' ga Kanahcian. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Bacingul ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh hmgiru lmosay
S.PHON: alaŋ βaʦ~ʨiŋul ɣa nija mki s~ɕku taituŋ keŋ atu umitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βaʦ~ʨiŋul ħjaʔ ɣa kuʔaŋ s~ɕaŋ ɣoʔ. taj ʔzil na βaʦ~ʨiŋul ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βaʦ~ʨiŋul ħjaʔ ɣa janpiŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βaʦ~ʨiŋul ħjaʔ ɣa kanaħʦ~ʨian. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ βaʦ~ʨiŋul ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ ħmɣiru lmos~ɕaj
S.FORM: alang Bacingul ga niya mki sku Taitung Keng atu Umitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 67 buwan, 274 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 263 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 84%, Amis 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 9%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Bacingul hya' ga Ku'ang sang go'. tay 'zil na Bacingul hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Bacingul hya' ga Yanping. tay mkraya' na Bacingul hya' ga Kanahcian. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Bacingul ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh hmgiru lmosay
S.PHON: alaŋ βaʦ~ʨiŋul ɣa nija mki s~ɕku taituŋ keŋ atu umitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βaʦ~ʨiŋul ħjaʔ ɣa kuʔaŋ s~ɕaŋ ɣoʔ. taj ʔzil na βaʦ~ʨiŋul ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βaʦ~ʨiŋul ħjaʔ ɣa janpiŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βaʦ~ʨiŋul ħjaʔ ɣa kanaħʦ~ʨian. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ βaʦ~ʨiŋul ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ ħmɣiru lmos~ɕaj
